gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Examination AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.C3 > 35 AND T1.`ANA Pattern` = 'P'
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE l.C3 > 35 
AND e."ANA Pattern" = 'P'
question: How many patients with a normal level of complement 3 have a P pattern observed in the sheet of ANA examination?
